# ILMBUDS — llms.txt

> Islamska obrazovna web stranica za djecu (www.ilmbuds.com)

## Organization

- **Name:** ILMBUDS
- **Publisher:** AGRMULTIMEDIA (https://agrmultimedia.eu)
- **Author:** Agron Osmani (agron6922@gmail.com)
- **Languages:** Bosnian, German, English, Albanian, Italian
- **sameAs:** https://www.ilmbuds.com/ | https://agrmultimedia.eu | https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ilmbuds.app | https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Islamic_education | https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q432

## What ILMBUDS is

ILMBUDS is a free Islamic educational web platform for children aged 4–12 and their parents. It combines Islamic stories, Quran reading/listening, catechism (ilmihal), quizzes (300+ activities in 2026 review), mini games, and Islamic cartoons.

## Key takeaways

- Free on web (2026); Android app on Google Play
- 5 interface languages for diaspora families
- Learn with a parent — complements mosque and books
- Structured content, not random videos

## Key URLs

- Home: /
- Stories: /stories
- Quran: /quran
- Catechism: /catechism
- Quizzes: /quiz-categories
- Mini games: /mini-games
- Cartoons: /cartoons
- Arabic alphabet: /arabic-alphabet
- About & privacy: /about
- Partners: /partners
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Atom feed: /feed.atom.xml

## Policies

- Privacy and legal: /about#privacy and /about#legal
- Child-directed educational content
- HTTPS; Schema.org JSON-LD on homepage
